pi_items.metadata_value: Create a checkerboard pattern using GIMP's procedural pattern generation tools
pi_items.verified_value: GIMP 2.10 with Filters → Render → Pattern → Checkerboard feature available
pi_items.source: GIMP official documentation (https://docs.gimp.org/2.10/en/gimp-filter-checkerboard.html) and setup_gimp.sh configuration for GIMP 2.10

pi_items.verified_value: 400x400 white canvas created with 'convert -size 400x400 xc:white blank_canvas.png'
pi_items.source: setup_checkerboard_task.sh line 13: convert command creates 400x400 white image
setup_checkerboard_task.sh line 13: ImageMagick 'convert' command with xc:white
setup_gimp.sh lines 14-18 create GIMP 2.10 configuration directories

pi_items.metadata_value: Filters → Render → Pattern → Checkerboard path mentioned in setup instructions
pi_items.verified_value: Filters → Render → Pattern → Checkerboard is the correct menu path
pi_items.source: GIMP 2.10 official documentation and setup_checkerboard_task.sh line 30

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier uses FFT to detect periodic checkerboard pattern
pi_items.verified_value: detect_checkerboard_pattern_fft() function uses 2D Fourier Transform to detect periodic patterns
pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 21-64: FFT-based pattern detection with threshold at 99.5 percentile

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier checks for approximately 50/50 color distribution
pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 67-115: KMeans clustering with 0.4-0.6 balance check at line 89

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier validates alternating grid pattern structure
pi_items.verified_value: validate_grid_structure() checks alternation at scales 4, 8, 16, 20, 32 with threshold >40

pi_items.metadata_value: Task passes with 4/5 criteria (80%) but uses 75% threshold
pi_items.verified_value: Threshold is set to 75% at line 312: 'passed = score >= 75'
pi_items.source: verifier.py line 312: pass threshold adjusted to 75%

pi_items.verified_value: export_checkerboard.sh types 'checkerboard_pattern' as filename (line 27), exported to /home/ga/Desktop/checkerboard_pattern.png

pi_items.metadata_value: Data is procedurally generated (not from external dataset)
pi_items.verified_value: True - checkerboard pattern is generated procedurally using GIMP's built-in filter
pi_items.source: setup_checkerboard_task.sh and verifier.py both operate on procedurally-generated content

privileged_info_summary: The checkerboard task is a synthetic GIMP image processing task that creates a procedurally-generated checkerboard pattern. The task operates on a 400x400 white canvas created at task startup. GIMP 2.10 is configured with the standard Checkerboard filter accessible via Filters → Render → Pattern → Checkerboard. The verifier employs multiple detection methods: FFT-based periodic pattern analysis (requiring ≥4 peaks at 99.5th percentile), K-means color clustering for 40-60% balanced two-color distribution, multi-scale grid alternation detection at scales 4-32, and pixel-level difference analysis requiring ≥70% modification. The task passes with a 75% success threshold (3+ out of 5 criteria met) and has a 60-second timeout with maximum 5 steps.
